summary: Completed comprehensive UI/UX testing for Meridiant v2.0.0 new features. All 19 test cases passed: Hero section with Indonesian tagline, chain pills, feature badges, mobile hamburger menu, mobile sign-in flow, FAQ page with 8 items in Indonesian, hero hiding after login, transfer/withdraw tabs, profile dropdown, mobile navigation after login, and fullscreen token selector on mobile.

issues: Google OAuth console warning: 'The given origin is not allowed for the given client ID' - This is expected behavior in preview environment
React console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - Minor accessibility improvement suggestion

success_rate.backend: 100% (3/3 API checks passed: health, signin, prices)

seed_data_creation: Test user already seeded from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX optimization features fully tested and working: Hero section with Indonesian text, chain pills (BNB, Polygon, Solana, Ethereum, Avalanche), feature badges (Instan, Aman, Multi-Chain), mobile responsive navbar with hamburger menu, FAQ page in Indonesian with 8 expandable items, hero hides after login, mobile fullscreen token selector. Google OAuth warning in console is expected for preview environment.
